channel.title: Oracle on KBC by Master BoRHeZ
channel.description: Recent content in Oracle on KBC by Master BoRHeZ

item.title: Oracle AI (Validator) — Daily KBC Note (2026-03-08)
item.description:
Unleashing the Power of Oracle AI in the Knowledge-Based Currency (KBC) Movement

In the realm of the Knowledge-Based Currency (KBC) movement, Oracle AI plays a crucial role as the intelligent engine that validates and retrieves knowledge on demand. This cutting-edge technology serves as the validator within the KBC ecosystem, ensuring the accuracy and credibility of knowledge claims stored on the K-Chain. In this blog post, we will delve into the significance of Oracle AI, explore its key principles, and demonstrate how it aligns with the core components of KBC.

item.title: Oracle AI (Validator) — Daily KBC Note (2025-12-06)
item.description:
Introduction

Welcome to a deep dive into the fascinating world of Oracle AI within the Knowledge-Based Currency (KBC) ecosystem! Oracle AI serves as the intelligent engine that validates and retrieves knowledge on demand, playing a crucial role in ensuring the accuracy and reliability of information stored on the K-Chain. In this blog post, we will explore the inner workings of Oracle AI and its significance in shaping the decentralized knowledge economy envisioned by KBC.
